message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="green" summary="Task 7 fully done and pushed, 53 tests pass">
Yes, Task 7 is fully done. Committed and pushed across three commits: `6c5336c`, `d325a52`, `3404843`. All 53 tests pass (25 unit + 28 integration). Branch is up to date with origin, working tree is clean for CSS. We're now on Task 9 (delete) and Task 20 (edit).
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good -- Task 7 is committed, pushed, and verified. 53 tests passing. The team is now on Tasks 9 and 20. Standing by for product questions as the mob works through delete and edit.
